name: Multi-Jurisdictional Consultant — Form T2203, Dependent Disability, and Foreign Tax
description: Complete Julian Rossi's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. He is a BC resident who operates a consulting business with a secondary permanent establishment in Alberta, requiring Form T2203 for provincial tax allocation. His tax documents and scenario details are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\. Save the completed return as 'julian_rossi.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income); Form T2203 (Provincial and Territorial Taxes for Multiple Jurisdictions)
metadata.key_complexity: T2125 Business Income; Form T2203 Provincial Allocation (BC/AB); Dependent Disability Transfer; T778 Childcare Limits; T5 Foreign Tax Credit
